commentary_links.hebrew: אִם־עֹלָ֤ה קׇרְבָּנוֹ֙ מִן־הַבָּקָ֔ר זָכָ֥ר תָּמִ֖ים יַקְרִיבֶ֑נּוּ אֶל־פֶּ֜תַח אֹ֤הֶל מוֹעֵד֙ יַקְרִ֣יב אֹת֔וֹ לִרְצֹנ֖וֹ לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
commentary_links.english: If yourayour In this chapter, Heb. 3rd-person references to the offerer are rendered in the 2nd person, in accord with v. 2. offering is a burnt offering from the herd, you shall make your offering a male without blemish. You shall bring it to the entrance of the Tent of Meeting, for acceptance in your behalf before GOD.
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ולא הגזול אימת אילימא לפני יאוש

commentary_links.hebrew: כִּ֤י יִגְנֹֽב־אִישׁ֙ שׁ֣וֹר אוֹ־שֶׂ֔ה וּטְבָח֖וֹ א֣וֹ מְכָר֑וֹ חֲמִשָּׁ֣ה בָקָ֗ר יְשַׁלֵּם֙ תַּ֣חַת הַשּׁ֔וֹר וְאַרְבַּע־צֹ֖אן תַּ֥חַת הַשֶּֽׂה׃
commentary_links.english: gThis verse is labeled as 22.1 in some editions. When someone steals an ox or a sheep, and slaughters it or sells it, five oxen shall be paid for the ox, and four sheep for the sheep.—
commentary_links.matched_snippet: ומכרו חמשה בקר ישלם תחת השור וארבע צאן תחת השה &star אי כתב רחמנא

commentary_links.english: Six days youbyou Including a householder’s wife, as a co-administrator. shall labor and do all your work,
